_comment: A2R Computer Use — Adapter Conformance Grades. Updated when conformance suites run.

browser.playwright.note: Suite A requires live Playwright browser. Run: pytest -k browser-deterministic-v1

browser.browser-use.note: Suite B not yet implemented. Grade assigned from manifest declaration.

browser.cdp.note: Runs subset of Suite A. Grade assigned from manifest declaration.

browser.extension.note: Suite not yet implemented. Requires extension WebSocket connection.

retrieval.playwright-crawler.note: Suite R implemented. Run: pytest -k retrieval-v1

desktop.pyautogui.note: Suite D requires display. Run: pytest -k desktop-v1

hybrid.orchestrator.note: Suite H implemented. Run: pytest -k hybrid-v1

_routing_policy.note: Suite F passes 6/6. Does not correspond to a single adapter.
